sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44760" key="eu)peri/fwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπερί-φωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily detected</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῖς πολεμίοις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.238f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
